title: Resolution Authorizing the Municipal Government of Los Baños (MGLB) Through the Local Chief Executive Honorable Mayor Anthony F. Genuino to Enter Into Contract for the Services of Architect Dennis C Paragas As Consultant for Various Municipal Architectural Design with Corresponding Monthly Compensation of Thirty Thousand Pesos (P 30,000.00). Councilor Jonathan Bryan S.siytiap 01/23/2023
